commands.summary: 16/16. The send/retry paths now go through channels.select('sms_send').send(...) and the webhooks through the Twilio adapter's parseInbound/parseStatus; all existing server HTTP-contract tests stay green, proving behaviour is unchanged. A new test proves the Twilio adapter conforms to the channel contract (capabilities, send mapping, inbound/status normalization).
62 node tests pass, 1 skipped (opt-in live Twilio), renderer interaction suite green; node --check across entry modules.

environment.process_note: 015 Phase 0 complete. CLV-001: docs/communications-runtime.md documents the ForgeLink-owned model and the boundary to transport/provider state, and how existing SMS/MMS map in. CLV-002: provider-neutral contracts + registry with provider selection and clean rejection of unsupported capabilities, and existing Twilio behaviour now runs through the adapter boundary. CLV-003: Twilio is the first SMS/MMS edge adapter (send + inbound/status normalization behind the contract), existing server tests prove unchanged behaviour, a contract-compliance test was added, and the UI describes Twilio as the configured provider. Twilio-specific fields (provider message ID) are stored only for reconciliation.
